---
title: "Your post title"
subtitle: "One line on what this is really about"
date: 2026-01-01
categories: [tag1, tag2]
description: "Two sentences shown in the post listing. What is this about and why does it matter."
---

## Concept

What is this, in plain language? Write it as if explaining to a colleague over coffee.

## Why it matters

Why does this earn space in your head? Tie it to something concrete.

## Key takeaways

- **Concept name.** One or two sentences in your own words.
- **Another concept.** Same pattern.
- Keep to 3–7 bullets.

## Code example

```{r}
#| eval: false

# A small example showing the concept in action

```

## Resources

- [Link](#) — one sentence on what it is and how you used it.

## Gotchas

::: {.callout-warning}
The thing you most want future-you to know before touching this again.
:::

## Status

In progress / Done / Applied to [project].
